Off Calendar Mar-12-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Anne Kihagi, et al.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Michael Shintaku, CSR #8251. Telephone: 408-410-8040. Email: emailformike@hotmail.com. Judge: Gerardo C. Sandoval. Clerk: K. Dougherty. (D514).

Randall D. Morrison, Esq. was present in pre se, placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendants Anne Kihagi, et al.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract, Common Count and Quantum Meruit was filed on February 25, 2019, and personally served on defendants Aquat 009 LLC, Zorial LLC, Nozari 2 LLC, Renka Prop LLC and Xelan 1 LLC on May 22, 2019.
Plaintiff's Summons & Complaint was personally served on defendant Anne Kihagi, an individual, and Anne Kihagi as Managing Member of 1263 North Crescent LLC, on July 17, 2019.
Default as to defendants Aquat 009 LLC, Zorial LLC, Nozari 2 LLC, Renka Prop LLC and Xelan 1 LLC, was entered on July 8, 2019.
Default as to defendant Anne Kihagi, an individual, was entered on August 23, 2019.
Default as to defendant 1263 North Crescent LLC was entered on October 4, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on November 14, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Randell D. Morrison, an individual, and against the defaulted defendants, as follows:

Defendant Anne Kihagi, an individual:
Total Damages - $207,136.74.

Defendant 1263 North Crescent, LLC:
Total Damages - $39,856.44.

Defendant Aquat 009, LLC:
Total Damages - $39,856.44.

Defendant Zoriall, LLC:
Total Damages - $97,752.97.

Defendant Nozari 2, LLC:
Total Damages - $97,752.97.

Defendant Renka Prop, LLC:
Total Damages - $131,499.28.

Defendant Xelan Prop 1, LLC:
Total Damages - $126,804.49.

Furthermore, Judgment is joint and several as to the above-mentioned defendants, and therefore subject to a credit.

Plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Ntc Of Req./Mtn For Defualt Judgment Against All Deft'S
